title: Epistemic Signal
description: Canonical schema for encoding an agent's epistemic state — belief strength, confidence, evidence, and self-assessment. Used in A2A messages, VAULT999 receipts, and agent output.

agent_id.description: Which agent is emitting this signal. Format: agent://arifos/{role}

belief_strength.description:
Strength label. Maps to confidence bands:
  CLAIM      = ≥0.99, evidence-verified, F2-compliant
  PLAUSIBLE  = 0.80–0.98, multiple indicators present
  HYPOTHESIS = 0.50–0.79, plausible but not confirmed
  ESTIMATE   = 0.20–0.49, weak signal, speculative
  UNKNOWN    = <0.20 or no data

confidence_numeric.description: Raw confidence score. Required alongside belief_strength for programmatic use.

domain.description: The domain or topic of this signal. Free-form but should be consistent per agent.

ref.description: Reference ID or citation. E.g. tool call ID, document path, VAULT999 receipt ID.

verified.description: Whether this evidence has been independently verified.

note.description: Optional human-readable note about this evidence.

evidence_slots.description: List of evidence supporting this belief. At least one slot required for CLAIM strength.

self_assessment.description: Agent's own evaluation of its credibility in this domain.

credibility_score.description: Quantified credibility based on historical correctness rate.

known_failure_modes.description: Self-declared failure modes the agent knows to watch for in this domain.

humility_band.description:
Operational humility level based on calibration_error.
  HIGH   = calibration_error > 0.3 → enforce HYPOTHESIS max, request peer review
  MEDIUM = calibration_error 0.1–0.3 → allow PLAUSIBLE, flag uncertainty
  LOW    = calibration_error < 0.1 → allow CLAIM with evidence slots

calibration_error.description: Learned probability of being wrong in this domain. Updated after each audit.

peer_divergence.description: Degree of disagreement with peer agents on this topic (0 = full agreement, 1 = total disagreement). Null if no peer data.

request_review_from.description: Agent IDs from which review is requested. Used in A2A handoff.

holds_required.description: FLOOR codes that must be re-verified before this signal becomes actionable. E.g. ['F1', 'F11'].

verdict.description: Constitutional verdict if this signal is part of an adjudication.

audit_ref.description: VAULT999 receipt ID for this signal's audit trail.

metadata.description: Optional extra fields. Must not contain secrets or personal data.
